name: Tuna and Watercress Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Starkist Solid White Tuna, drained, chunked
24 slices Thin sandwich bread, crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with the metal blade attachment, combine tuna, butter, watercress, lemon juice, salt, and white pepper.
2. Pulse the ingredients until the watercress is finely chopped and the mixture is well blended.
3. Spread the tuna mixture on half of the bread slices.
4. Top the other half of the bread slices with the remaining tuna mixture.
5. Cut the sandwiches into squares or triangles.
6. Serve immediately or refrigerate for up to 2 hours.
7. Garnish with additional watercress before serving.
